loop1.title: Power & Energy (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing total active power and energy — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset; trend and delta metrics are not available.

loop1.title: Voltage Monitor (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing live three-phase voltage trends (R-N, Y-N, B-N) and aggregate stats (Avg/Max/Min); legend values and threshold lines are static defaults as no dedicated scalar columns exist for them.
